productDisplayName: Nike Women White Fivekay Sports Shoes
description: Style Note The nike Fivekay women's shoe is an iconic design and an all-time athletic favorite. Taken from the tennis courts and loved for its impressive versatility, the Fivekay features premium metallic finishes for flavor and a Fit perfect for dependable comfort. Deepika Padukone's been caught wearing one of these, so why shouldn't you? Product Details Synthetic upper and reinforced toe tip for durability Has a Nike swoosh branding at the midfoot Lace-up for snug fit Nike brand tag appliqued on the tongue Pull tag to slide your foot in easily Autoclave midsole for lightweight comfort Solid rubber outsole with herringbone pattern for traction and durability. Material and Care Synthetic Wipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
